subcodes.first_line: Today all ties are severed, for this is the Day of unveiling and of meeting, and all relationships pertain to the Truth Itself [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: جمیع نسبتها الیوم منقطع است چه که یوم مکاشفه و لقاست و جمیع نسبتها بنفس حق
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @prayer for praise and gratitude, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @consolation and comfort, @presence of; reunion with God, @spiritual transformation, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
